title: Archive evolution.py::SelfModifier (Phase 5 cruft, zero callers, attractive nuisance)
current_state: evolution.py:294-389 contains SelfModifier class with modify_consciousness (rewrites prompts/consciousness.txt programmatically) and add_tool (writes new .py file into tools/). Grep confirms zero callers anywhere in the codebase. Dates back to Phase 5 self-evolution dream. The 'Pi evolves itself' goal now lives in scripts/sprint.py.
structural_problem: Loaded gun in the drawer. Future Phase 8+ wires this up as 'auto-improve prompts' → an LLM-generated consciousness edit breaks startup → daemon enters restart loop. Or add_tool writes a malformed Python file that breaks agent/tools.py imports. The backup mechanism is good but there is no rollback test and no verification gate.
target_state: SelfModifier class removed from evolution.py and archived to docs/_archive/evolution_self_modifier_v1.py. evolution.py keeps EvolutionTracker (the live class). Solutions log records why this was abandoned so future-Ash does not re-add it without designing it properly.
success_criteria: grep -r 'SelfModifier' returns hits only in docs/_archive/ and SOLUTIONS.jsonl
risk_notes: None — class is unreferenced. Archive (not delete) per file-touch policy.
migration_plan: 1. Copy evolution.py lines 294-389 (SelfModifier class) to docs/_archive/evolution_self_modifier_v1.py with a header comment explaining the archive reason
3. Verify imports clean: python -c 'from evolution import EvolutionTracker'

4. Append SOLUTIONS.jsonl with root_cause (Phase 5 speculative, zero callers in 56 logged solutions) + better_future_fix (if self-modification returns, sandbox it: write to tools/_proposed/ gitignored dir, require verify.py PASS + human approval flag)
